name: Synup Social vs. SEMRush
hero_summary: Is SEMRush letting you down with its all-in-one marketing solution? We thought so. Some companies weren’t meant to do it all - and that’s okay. Its basic tools do the job, but SEMRush clearly skimped on more advanced features. If you’re looking for an upgrade, try Synup Social, a platform that works for you by creating AI-generated posts, doing trend and competitor research, analyzing engagement post-by-post, and more.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Get inspired to fill your content calendar
section_2_summary: Good social media management tools must be reliable, efficient, and cost-effective. Synup Social wins over SEMRush on all of these, and more. With superior analytics, advanced multi-brand and multi-location management capabilities, inspired content creation, and more, Synup Social saves you time and money at every turn:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: Why publish anything less than your best? SEMRush leaves you to your own devices when it comes to content optimization, but Synup Social recommends the best time to post based on your past posts’ performance and when your audience is the most active. Time to get more eyes, more engagement, and more gratification.
section_2_slider_2_summary: Post creation is Synup Social’s specialty. SEMRush leaves you to your own devices with content creation. You deserve a platform that will help you revive your best posts automatically, stay inspired with automated trend research, and even write your posts for you. Get ready to be inspired.
section_2_slider_3_heading: Collaboration is the name of the game
section_2_step_3_summary: SEMRush’s approval workflow leaves much to be desired. With Synup Social, supervisors and clients can easily approve posts and provide feedback, ensuring that every published post adheres to your brand's distinct voice.
section_2_slider_4_summary: Although SEMRush is an all-in-one tool, its multi-account support is seriously lacking (and seriously confusing). Synup Social makes it easy to juggle all your accounts, whether you’re an agency or a multi-location business. You can even create and publish posts across accounts - all with one click!
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over SEMRush?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: With robust analytics and advanced content creation abilities, Synup Social inspires productivity, delivers killer insights, and drives results. SEMRush just isn’t the all-in-one solution it’s cut out to be - and that’s okay. Come get a little help from Team Synup:
